ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "infection_type" TEXT /* Type of infection (URTIs or LRTIs) */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Patient outcome (e.g., recovered, deceased, or ongoing treatment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signs_and_symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "fever" INTEGER /* Presence of fever (True/False) */,
  "cough" INTEGER /* Presence of cough (True/False) */,
  "shortness_of_breath" INTEGER /* Presence of shortness of breath (True/False) */,
  "myalgias" INTEGER /* Presence of myalgias (True/False) */,
  "headache" INTEGER /* Presence of headache (True/False) */,
  "sore_throat" INTEGER /* Presence of sore throat (True/False) */,
  "fatigue" INTEGER /* Presence of fatigue (True/False) */,
  "symptom_severity" TEXT /* Severity of symptoms (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when symptoms were reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signs_and_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Code of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_method" TEXT /* Method used for diagnosis (e.g., lab test, physical examination) */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the diagnosis (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "diagnosis_status" TEXT /* Status of the diagnosis (e.g., confirmed, suspected, ruled out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_code" TEXT /* Code of the treatment */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., effective, ineffective, side effects) */,
  "treatment_adherence" INTEGER /* Patient adherence to the treatment (True/False) */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan (e.g., medication schedule, therapy sessions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Activity log of the user (e.g., login history, data modifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Pre-existing condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "vaccination_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccine administration */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status (e.g., fully vaccinated, partially vaccinated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptom_severity_scale" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis method (e.g., lab test, physical examination) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment outcome (e.g., effective, ineffective, side effects) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)
